name: Claude
description: Claude app-server harness. Delegates Anthropic-provider turns to a local @openclaw/claude-app-server process, mirroring the codex-app-server pattern. Exposes OpenClaw dynamic tools to Claude inside the turn.

command.description: Executable for the openclaw-claude-app-server binary. Defaults to 'openclaw-claude-app-server' on PATH.

args.description: Extra CLI args for the server.

env.description: Extra env vars injected into the server process.

approvalPolicy.description: Codex-shaped approval policy. 'never' bypasses approval gates (the default and equivalent to the legacy bypassPermissions setting).

sandbox.description: Sandbox mode echoed to the server at thread/start.

turnIdleTimeoutMs.description: Idle watchdog: fail the turn if no notification arrives for this many ms.

statePath.description: Path for the on-disk sessionId↔threadId mapping. Defaults to ~/.openclaw/state/claude-threads.json

exclude.description: OpenClaw dynamic tool names to omit when projecting into Claude turns.

appServer.approvalPolicy.label: Approval Policy
appServer.approvalPolicy.help: 'never' is the openclaw-default unattended posture. Switch to 'untrusted' or 'on-request' to wire the codex approval-request protocol; the plugin currently auto-declines unhandled approval requests.

appServer.sandbox.label: Sandbox
appServer.sandbox.help: Sandbox mode echoed to the server (the server doesn't enforce this; it's informational at this layer).
